scope: Representative trust closure for validation of provisional Gate 0 repository records only.

components.name: GitHub repository settings API
components.containment: Capture and digest API responses, compare independent endpoints, and never treat API success alone as proof of the repository state.
components.rationale: The service is an observation and mutation boundary, not an Orange proof authority.
compromise_effects: A forged response could cause the repository-control snapshot to misstate a security setting.
review_triggers: Any repository-control change or GitHub API version change

components.name: Gate 0 foundation record validator
components.rationale: Within this narrow fixture, its acceptance controls only the claim that a record conforms to the provisional repository schema.
compromise_effects: A defect could accept a malformed Gate 0 record; it cannot establish a product proof or release claim.
review_triggers: Any validator, schema, or supported-keyword change

change_from_prior.summary: This representative fixture has no prior inventory.

limitations: This is synthetic conformance data, not the complete Orange trusted computing base.
No product checker, proof kernel, compiler, target model, or release builder exists in Gate 0.
